categoryGroups.name: Devices
categoryGroups.description: Core vape hardware families for wholesale catalogues and brand programs.
categoryGroups.descriptionZh: 面向批发目录和品牌项目的核心电子烟硬件系列。

children.name: Pod Systems
children.description: Compact refillable and replaceable pod devices for distributors and private-label programs.
children.descriptionZh: 适合经销商和贴牌项目的紧凑型可注油/可换弹设备。

children.name: Starter Kits
children.description: Bundled device and packaging solutions built for brand launches, channel samples, and wholesale catalogues.
children.descriptionZh: 适合品牌首发、渠道样品和批发目录的设备与包装套装。

categoryGroups.name: Ready Lines
categoryGroups.description: Fast catalogue items for distributors that need clear SKUs and quick quotation.
categoryGroups.descriptionZh: 适合需要清晰 SKU 和快速报价的经销商目录产品。

children.name: Disposable Vapes
children.description: Ready-to-ship disposable lines with modern finishes, multiple capacity tiers, and market-ready packaging.
children.descriptionZh: 具备现代外观、多容量档位和市场化包装的一次性产品线。

children.name: Sample Packs
children.description: Mixed samples for buyer evaluation, trade-show preparation, and distributor sales teams.
children.descriptionZh: 用于买家评估、展会准备和经销商销售团队的混合样品包。

categoryGroups.name: Parts & Accessories
categoryGroups.description: Replacement parts and add-on items for repeat orders, service packs, and channel replenishment.
categoryGroups.descriptionZh: 用于复购订单、售后套包和渠道补货的替换件与附加产品。

children.name: Replacement Pods
children.description: Replacement cartridges and pod packs for repeat-purchase programs and distributor replenishment.
children.descriptionZh: 面向复购项目和经销商补货的替换烟弹与烟弹套包。

children.name: Coils & Accessories
children.description: Mesh coils, cables, lanyards, and small accessories that support catalogue follow-up orders.
children.descriptionZh: Mesh 雾化芯、线材、挂绳和小配件，适合目录后续补充订单。

categoryGroups.name: Brand Support
categoryGroups.description: Packaging and OEM services that turn selected models into market-ready business orders.
categoryGroups.descriptionZh: 把选定型号转化为可上市商业订单的包装与 OEM 服务。

children.name: Packaging & OEM
children.description: Retail boxes, sleeves, manuals, logo placement, and sample-ready presentation support.
children.descriptionZh: 支持零售盒、套筒、说明书、Logo 位置和样品展示包装。

children.name: Retail Displays
children.description: Counter displays, sample boards, and sales tools for distributors and retail channel teams.
children.descriptionZh: 面向经销商和零售渠道团队的柜台陈列、样品板和销售工具。
